---
title: "Accounting for biodiversity impacts of consumption and production: current gaps and frontiers."
description: " "
date: "2026-06-12"
categories: [Article, Biodiversity, Metrics, LCA, EEMRIO]
---

### Description





* [Download Davos Poster (PDF)] <!-- (../assets/davos_2026_poster.pdf) -->

* [Download First Pre-print (PDF)](https://ecoevorxiv.org/repository/view/9107/)
